claim: AI agents have six core components: model, tools, knowledge/memory, audio/speech, guardrails, and orchestration
actionable: When building AI agents, ensure all six components are implemented rather than focusing only on model selection—include explicit guardrails and orchestration/monitoring
source_title: Zero To Your First AI Agent In 26 Minutes (no code)

claim: Guardrails must include violation detection (harmful content screening) and error handling for failed tool calls
actionable: Implement content violation detection using LLM classification and switch-based conditional logic to handle errors gracefully rather than failing entire workflows
source_title: Zero To Your First AI Agent In 26 Minutes (no code)

claim: Orchestration requires evaluation metrics to measure agent performance and enable iterative improvement over time
actionable: Set up evaluation spreadsheets with test cases and use LLM-based metrics (e.g., helpfulness scoring 1-5) to systematically measure and improve agent responses
source_title: Zero To Your First AI Agent In 26 Minutes (no code)

claim: Meta-prompts can generate task-specific agent prompts by specifying use case, inputs, outputs, constraints, and available tools
actionable: Use meta-prompts to generate comprehensive agent instructions: describe the role, specific inputs/outputs, constraints, and tools, then let the LLM fill in implementation details
source_title: Zero To Your First AI Agent In 26 Minutes (no code)

claim: Skipping guardrails and orchestration leads to production problems that appear acceptable in prototypes but fail at scale
actionable: Always implement guardrails and evaluation mechanisms from the start—not after deployment—to catch issues before they affect users
source_title: Zero To Your First AI Agent In 26 Minutes (no code)

claim: N8N's switch node enables conditional branching based on guardrail checks, routing workflows to error handlers or continuations
actionable: Use switch nodes in N8N to implement conditional logic: if content violates safeguards, route to error notification; if clean, continue to main workflow
source_title: Zero To Your First AI Agent In 26 Minutes (no code)
